case_title: MULLAN, DANIEL VS FORD MOTOR COMPANY C/O C.T. CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY C/O C.T. CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULLAN, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY C/O C.T. CORPORATION $3,270.73 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,291.73, CASE WAS CALLED AT 4:20 PM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO CT COPR AUTH AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FOR FORD MOTOR CORP. RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,270.73 FILED BY MULLAN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY C/O C.T. CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
